text:
Created attachment 216085
version bumped up

update version from 1.1.2 to 1.2, removed the patch since there is not needed, more information here: https://pecl.php.net/package-changelog.php?package=ssh2&release=1.2 I made a sample script ran it and it works fine for PHP 7.4, poudriere passed for 7.2 as well.
